mapper.sql: SELECT id, warehouse_code, consignee, phone_number, country, province, city, district, detailed_address, postal_code, is_default, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_warehouse_receiver WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: AND warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_warehouse_receiver( warehouse_code, consignee, phone_number, country, province, city, district, detailed_address, postal_code, is_default, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{warehouseCode}, #{consignee}, #{phoneNumber}, #{country}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailedAddress}, #{postalCode}, #{isDefault}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_warehouse_receiver
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, consignee = #{consignee}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, country = #{country}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detailed_address = #{detailedAddress}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, is_default = #{isDefault}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_warehouse_receiver SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_warehouse_receiver SET is_default = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_warehouse_receiver SET is_default = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
